rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use annex agree blocks to contain AGREE contracts, with type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference only visible ports and features; avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths.
AGREE annexes must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for assignments.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers or locally declared helpers to avoid type resolution errors.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted strings and expressed as boolean conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes; use implementation scopes for subcomponent assignments.
Avoid referencing AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are explicitly typed ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: Model analyst extraction of component structure
